title: Architect a data platform in Azure
summary: Learn how to architect a data platform in Azure and build solutions to store relational and NoSQL data.

sections.title: Architect a data platform in Azure
sections.summary: Learn how to architect a data platform in Azure and build solutions to store relational and NoSQL data.

lessons.title: Migrate SQL Server workloads to Azure SQL Database
lessons.content_md:
Learn the essentials of Azure SQL Database deployment and migration. Explore its benefits, exclusive features, and migration options while optimizing performance and application connections for a smooth transition to the cloud.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/migrate-sql-workloads-azure-sql-databases/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Migrate SQL Server workloads to Azure SQL Database

lessons.title: Explore Azure Cosmos DB
lessons.content_md:
Learn the core features and functionality of Azure Cosmos DB.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/explore-azure-cosmos-db/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Work with Azure Cosmos DB
lessons.content_md:
Work with Azure Cosmos DB

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/work-with-cosmos-db/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Architect a data platform in Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Architect a data platform in Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
